The AWS CloudFormation template for this Serverless application

C:\\Users\\jgpot\\Documents\\legal-audit.serviceRawFile:
# "org" ensures this Service is used with the correct Serverless Framework Access Key.
org: thepixelsinc
service: legal-audit-pipeline

provider:
  name: aws
  runtime: python3.12
  stage: ${opt:stage, 'staging'}
  region: us-east-1
  environment:
    STAGE: ${self:provider.stage}
    LOG_LEVEL: "INFO"
  iam:
    role:
      statements:
        - Effect: Allow
          Action:
            - sqs:SendMessage
          Resource: !GetAtt AuditQueue.Arn

functions:
  ingestAudit:
    handler: handler.ingest_audit
    events:
      - http:
          path: audit/submit
          method: post
          cors: true
    environment:
      QUEUE_URL: !Ref AuditQueue

  processAuditBatch:
    handler: handler.process_audit_batch
    events:
      - sqs:
          arn: !GetAtt AuditQueue.Arn
          batchSize: 5

resources:
  Resources:
    AuditQueue:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: ${self:service}-audit-queue-${self:provider.stage}
        VisibilityTimeout: 90
        RedrivePolicy:
          Fn::Sub:
            - '{"deadLetterTargetArn":"${dlqArn}","maxReceiveCount":3}'
            - dlqArn: !GetAtt AuditDLQ.Arn

    AuditDLQ:
      Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
      Properties:
        QueueName: ${self:service}-audit-dlq-${self:provider.stage}

custom:
  pythonRequirements:
    useUv: true
